name: offer_letter_draft_park_slope
description: Canonical realestate-catalog scenario: draft_offer_letter returns a draft offer of $1.4M on 123 Maple St (96.1% of asking).

data.letter:
Dear seller,

On behalf of my client, I am pleased to submit an offer of $1,400,000 for 123 Maple St in Park Slope, Brooklyn.

This offer represents 100.4% of the asking price of $1,395,000. My client is a qualified buyer with pre-approval in hand and a flexible close.

Terms:
  - All-cash to $1,400,000
  - Standard contingencies (inspection, financing, title)
  - 45-day close, flexible on rent-back

We are excited about this home and would welcome the opportunity to discuss any seller priorities. Looking forward to next steps.

Warmly,
Homestead Buyer's Agent
